top_signals.title: Former BIS chief softens stance on stablecoins, backs coexistence with fiat
top_signals.summary: Former BIS general manager Agustín Carstens said stablecoins can enhance financial inclusion and innovation but stressed the need for global regulatory frameworks to enable coexistence with fiat money.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Google’s online dominance is showing signs of cracking in AI era
top_signals.summary: While Google remains in a position of strength in the eyes of Wall Street, the AI era is complicating the company's story.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Senate passes housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030
top_signals.summary: The Senate voted 85-5 to pass a major housing affordability bill that includes a ban on the Federal Reserve making a central bank digital currency until 2030.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
